purpose: Improved strict qwen W7 tracker quality refresh after Stream 12 quality caveats and Stream 22 qwen no-cache timeout.
scope: One real qwen/qwen3.5-9b specialist tracker run with --strict-final and no fallback synthesis; LM Studio local only; no direct paid API calls.
codeChanges: Refreshed compact specialist KB facts to remove pre-Stream-9/12 stale W7 wording.
Allowed current docs/evals review and gap-audit files plus results/user-review-packet-summary.json in the tracker prompt.
Normalized gh repo view --json requests to valid bounded JamiStudio/local-evals fields.

dryRun.result: dry_run smoke passed before qwen load

realRun.command: uv run python scripts/daily-brief-tracker.py --model qwen/qwen3.5-9b --use-specialist --strict-final --max-steps 4 --query "JamiStudio/local-evals current Stream 23 quality refresh: summarize exact pushed evidence from Streams 16-22; use repo files under docs/evals and results only plus valid gh repo view fields; do not use stale Stream 9-only wording"
realRun.modelFailureReason: model returned blank or missing required sections
realRun.githubObservation: Valid gh repo view fields returned name, description, stargazerCount, updatedAt, and url.

improved: No invalid GitHub JSON-field request reached gh CLI.
No weak unrelated web-search result was included; the run focused on repo files.
The artifact cited current Stream 21/22 audit and review-packet surfaces rather than only Stream 9-era wording.
notImproved: The strict model output omitted the Token & Speed section and was cut off during Recommended Actions.
It mislabeled some current qwen evidence as Stream 9 legacy wording.
It still cannot be accepted as final W7 quality evidence without user review.
qualityAssessment.verdict: Stream 23 improves tool relevance and GitHub handling but does not close W7 strict quality acceptance.

remainingGaps: Broad/full local matrix coverage remains incomplete.
Qwen uncached current-suite throughput remains incomplete.
Final two-verifier completion audit remains pending.
